creator: ajv-julanistem@vsta.org
text:
ogg123 and something around arts were built againt libOggFLAC, a library
which no longer exists.

Fix: 

Rebuild affected components without stale library; libOggFLAC has apparently been folded into libFLAC.
How-To-Repeat: Try to play a .ogg with ogg123.  Start up KDE and try to hear a startup 
system sound.
